title: PM Lane 205 - PM Intake Field Start Bring-Back Review Exit Summary
summary: Added a browser-local `Local Field Start Bring-Back Review Exit Summary` at the end of the existing field-start bring-back panel on `/pm-review/import-intake`, immediately after the PM Lane 204 local closeout cue.
Compressed the final return posture into four browser-local classifications only: source review, customer/site clarification, lead/resource clarification, and future packet question.

Explained that anything needing approval submission, import, assignment, schedule/status, field direction, customer report, storage, export, route, control, or write authority needs a later bounded packet.

Kept the summary browser-local and non-interactive: no meeting-note capture, no localStorage or sessionStorage key, no export artifact, no backend route, no link, no button, no input, no textarea, no select, no task, no action item, no owner/due-date field, no lead selection, no crew assignment, no schedule/status write, no field instruction, no durable record, no production tracking row, no hosted write claim, and no production write.

Extended the focused read-only PM import-intake smoke to prove desktop presence, 390x844 mobile visibility, summary copy, zero links/buttons/inputs/textarea/select controls, no localStorage or sessionStorage review exit summary keys, no implied-authority link/control text, and zero mutation calls.
Used read-only sidecar Turing for placement and guardrail review only; VS Code Codex retained PM lane implementation and final integration authority.
